blocks.text: I’m a high school student from Eugene, Oregon who builds stunning websites that are fast and simple. Whether you’re a small business, a creative, or just someone with an idea — I’d love to help you create something that you’ll love. I design in the browser, ship every few days, and hand off something you can update yourself.

steps.title: We talk
steps.description: You tell me about your project — what you need, who it’s for, and what you’re imagining. A quick conversation is all it takes to get started.

steps.title: I design + build
steps.description: I get to work in the browser. You’ll see real progress every few days, not just mockups.

steps.title: We iterate
steps.description: You give feedback, I make it happen. Quick rounds until you’re happy — no rush, no pressure.

steps.title: You own it
steps.description: When it’s done, it’s yours — the site, the code, and the content. I’ll stick around if you need help down the road.

blocks.text: When I’m not building websites, you’ll find me flying FPV drones, making things in my workshop, or shipping orders from my Etsy store.
